title: Schloop Smp
description: Official Modpack For My Minecraft SMP
body:
![Header](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/903/281/bh_ssmp_header.webp)
Is updated with each season of my custom made SMP. Being updated every season from Vanilla to modded this pack will change as the SMP does. for a full list of versions check the bottom of the page

![About](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/903/278/bh_ssmp_banner1.webp)
The current version boasts an improved/vanilla+ Minecraft experience with some minor mods to enhance gameplay outside of QoL mods.


**Versions**

- Season 1 | Vanilla Minecraft 1.20.1
- Season 2 | Current, Slightly Modded 1.21
